changes.description: Pure function module — buildTrailHTML(options) generates self-contained HTML Structural Evidence Record. Document spine: §0 Decision Posture (executive summary, stability badge, snapshot ID), Structural Confidence Envelope (5-axis), §1 Structural Path to Posture (progressive disclosure, confidence bars), §2 Governance Boundary (collapsible prohibitions), §3 Structural Evidence Review (merged §3+§4, evidence chains as progressive disclosure). Includes derivePostureStability(), deriveConfidenceEnvelope(), computeSnapshotId(), STRUCTURAL_LANGUAGE map, humanize(), confidenceBar(). FORMAT_VERSION 1.1.

Added buildTrailHTML import. Extended SupportRail with onTrailExport prop and EVIDENCE RECORD block (always visible when fullReport loaded). Added handleTrailExport callback in IntelligenceField with Blob download. Threaded onTrailExport through SupportRail JSX props.
Added CSS for .support-block--trail, .trail-export-summary, .trail-count, .trail-export-trigger. Follows existing design system.
Stream closure — standard 9-section format (G2, no Section 10).
Implementation semantics for trail builder primitive.
